events.content: ROME TO SCARMAGNEI IS 208 KM DIRECTLY. THE REST OF THE JOURNEY INVOLVES TURNING AND HEADS NORTH. AFTER HOURS OF DRIVING THROUGH THE NIGHT, YOU ARRIVE AT A SMALL TOWN ON THE COASTLINE. THE LOCAL CUSTOMER SERVICE CAN GUIDE US THROUGH THE DELIVERY PROCESS OR WE CAN WAIT FOR IT TO COME IN VIA POSTAL SERVICES.

arguments.code: from zephyra_outfitters import get_order_details; details = {k: v for d in [get_order(order_id=o)['items'] for o in ['ORD-1005', 'ORD-1025']] for k, v in d[0].items()}; (details['unit_price'], sum(details['qty']*details['unit_price']))
